channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 67/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 67/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 42.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Have we ever had a future prime minister explicitly mugging off Andrew Neil this badly?
item.description: Have we ever had a future prime minister explicitly mugging off Andrew Neil this badly?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Burnham vows to ‘save’ Labour as Streeting launches leadership bid
item.description: Politics latest: Burnham vows to ‘save’ Labour as Streeting launches leadership bid

item.title: Sky News Politics: Streeting says he will run in any leadership race - and calls for UK to rejoin EU
item.description: Streeting says he will run in any leadership race - and calls for UK to rejoin EU

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Tommy Robinson tells tens of thousands at London rally to prepare for ‘battle of Britain’
item.description: Tommy Robinson tells tens of thousands at London rally to prepare for ‘battle of Britain’

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Even though it was expected, it's really striking to see a Labour leadership contender just straight-up say it out loud.
item.description: Even though it was expected, it's really striking to see a Labour leadership contender just straight-up say it out loud.

item.title: The Telegraph: ‘We want Starmer out’ – Tommy Robinson protesters descend on London - The Telegraph
item.description: ‘We want Starmer out’ – Tommy Robinson protesters descend on London - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Wes Streeting: I’ll stand for Labour leadership – and Britain must rejoin EU
item.description: Wes Streeting: I’ll stand for Labour leadership – and Britain must rejoin EU

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham told scrapped clean-air scheme could lose him by-election - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham told scrapped clean-air scheme could lose him by-election - The Telegraph

item.title: ITVX: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand in Labour leadership race | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Wes Streeting confirms he will stand in Labour leadership race | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham returns: I will take my fight 'as high as I can go' | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham returns: I will take my fight 'as high as I can go' | ITV News - ITVX
